name: Madison Macht
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Macht completed his medical degree and residency at the Oregon Health & Science University in Portland, Oregon. He then completed his pulmonary and critical care fellowship at the University of Colorado, Denver. He is board certified in Internal Medicine, Critical Care, Pulmonary and Neuro-Critical Care Medicine. Dr. Macht is married with two children and enjoys cycling, hiking, music, and spending time with his family.
